name: Qwen2.5-Omni
tagline: First Omni models (3B/7B) accepting text, image, audio and video and generating text and speech.
metaDescription: Qwen2.5-Omni (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2025-03-26 — part of the Qwen-Omni line. First Omni models (3B/7B) accepting text, image, audio and video and generatin…
overview: Qwen2.5-Omni is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen-Omni line. Released 2025-03-26. Natively end-to-end omni-modal models that take text, image, audio and video in and stream text plus natural speech out in real time.
What's notable in this version: First Omni models (3B/7B) accepting text, image, audio and video and generating text and speech.
